title: Property Consultant - Tata Housing - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Tata Housing - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Tata Housing has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Housing:
Tata Housing is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing!
